Life together,

all week long.

Fellowship · rest · community · faith

👋 Home groups Various times
🌳 Prayer garden Open all week
☕ Renew Wellbeing Thu 10am–12pm
🎉 Off the CUF 1st Saturday monthly

At Cathcart United Free Church we believe that faith is lived out together. We are a warm and welcoming congregation and we love spending time together — not just on Sundays but throughout the week.

Whether you are looking for a relaxed social gathering, an opportunity to explore faith questions, or ways to get involved in the wider community, here you will find the many ways our congregation connects, serves and grows — both within our own church family and alongside our neighbours in the wider Cathcart community.

🎉

Off the CUF

Our own monthly gathering — food, friendship and faith on the first Saturday of every month, 10:30am–12pm. Everyone welcome. Find out more →

👋

Fellowship & Rest

🏠

Fellowship Groups

Home Groups — small groups with members from Cathcart UF and Cathcart Church of Scotland meet regularly to look at the Bible together, pray and chat. Days and times vary by group.

We also run additional groups from time to time, including Christianity Explored, Discipleship Explored and Talking Jesus.

Ask about a group →
🌳

Prayer Garden

A quiet space for all to rest. Have a walk around, sit a while, and enjoy a bit of quiet time. We have seasonal topics on display for contemplation and prayer — we hope you'll find the garden a helpful place.

🕊️

Quiet Spaces

Two opportunities each week to step away from the busyness of life and find a moment of stillness and peace.

Rest & Restore
Mondays, 9–10am — Cathcart Baptist Church
Rest and pray within the sanctuary, stay for a short time or longer.

Quiet Space
Tuesdays, 10–11am — Cathcart Church of Scotland
A time of reflection, simplicity and stillness.

☕

Moments Café

A dementia friendly café — all welcome! A warm and relaxed space for everyone in the community.

1st and 3rd Monday of the month, 2–3:30pm
Cathcart Church of Scotland

—  GROW ✝ SERVE ✝ SHARE  —
☕

Renew Wellbeing

Every Thursday, 10am–12pm at Cathcart Baptist Church. All welcome!

We participate in Renew Wellbeing, a national movement that encourages churches to create spaces of stillness, welcome and prayer for people in their communities. Renew Wellbeing spaces offer a quiet, friendly place for anyone who may be struggling with their mental health or who simply needs somewhere calm to be.

It is a drop-in café style space where hobbies and activities are shared or co-produced, alongside a quiet space for prayer, stillness and renewing.

This is a joint venture across the three Cathcart churches — Cathcart UF, Cathcart Baptist and Cathcart Church of Scotland.

—  GROW ✝ SERVE ✝ SHARE  —
🤝

Partnerships

🤝

Working together in the community

We partner closely with Cathcart Church of Scotland, Cathcart Baptist Church, and Radiate Cathcart youth ministry to serve our community more effectively together than any of us could do alone. Find out more →

⛪

Buddy Churches

Cathcart United Free Church is part of the United Free Church of Scotland. We have a number of sister congregations in the Glasgow area with whom we share fellowship and friendship.

  • Croftfoot United Free Church
  • Darnley United Free Church
  • Shieldhall & Drumoyne United Free Church

Cathcart UF is part of the wider United Free Church of Scotland denomination. For information about the national work of our denomination visit ufcos.org.uk.

—  GROW ✝ SERVE ✝ SHARE  —
